message:
fix(hooks): add abort controller and mounted guard to useRating hook

The useRating hook was missing AbortController cleanup and mounted-ref
guards that sibling hooks (useAllRatings, useLeaderboard) already had.
This prevents state updates on unmounted components and allows inflight
fetches to be properly cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
